item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: First reading, referred to Ways & Means.
item.description: First reading, referred to Ways & Means.

item.title: 👍💵Matt Doumit - Washington Forest Protection Association
item.description: Matt Doumit signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Forest Protection Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍💵Heath Heikkila - American Forest Resource Council
item.description: Heath Heikkila signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent American Forest Resource Council. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: Minority; without recommendation.
item.description: Minority; without recommendation.

item.title: WM - Majority; do pass.
item.description: WM - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.description: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.guid: 2026-02-04/Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.

item.title: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.
item.description: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.
item.guid: 2026-02-10/Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 47; nays, 2; absent, 0; excused, 0.
item.description: Third reading, passed; yeas, 47; nays, 2; absent, 0; excused, 0.

item.title: First reading, referred to Finance.
item.description: First reading, referred to Finance.

item.title: The House Hot Sheet for Week 6 of the 2026 Legislative Session – Washington State House Democrats
item.description: News article "The House Hot Sheet for Week 6 of the 2026 Legislative Session – Washington State House Democrats" from House Democrats.

item.title: ❓Jeff Chapman - Jefferson County Assessor
item.description: Jeff Chapman signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Jefferson County Assessor.

item.title: February update from Olympia - Sen. Adrian Cortes
item.description: News article "February update from Olympia - Sen. Adrian Cortes" from Senate Democrats.

item.title: FIN - Executive action taken by committee.
item.description: FIN - Executive action taken by committee.

item.title: FIN - Majority; do pass.
item.description: FIN - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Referred to Rules 2 Review.
item.description: Referred to Rules 2 Review.

item.title: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
item.description: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.description: President signed.

item.title: Speaker signed.
item.description: Speaker signed.

item.title: Delivered to Governor.
item.description: Delivered to Governor.

item.title: Chapter 74, 2026 Laws.

item.title: Effective date 3/16/2026.
item.description: Effective date 3/16/2026.

item.title: Governor signed.
item.description: Governor signed.

item.title: 2026 legislative session recap! I hope to see you at our town hall on April 11 - Sen. Adrian Cortes
item.description: News article "2026 legislative session recap! I hope to see you at our town hall on April 11 - Sen. Adrian Cortes" from Senate Democrats.
